title: PROTOTYPE 2 CIT
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0559f66e858171aca88d67ae2f822ebb645a406.png)

This resourcepack adds new renames for weapons. The resourcepack is based on the game PROTOTYPE 2 and brings the main character's abilities to Minecraft. 

The following abilities have been ported: Blade, Hammerfist, Claws, Whipfist, Tendrils and Shield

 Renaming ENG/RU:
 
 - Hellers blade / Лезвие Хеллера
 - Hellers hammerfists / Молоты Хеллера 
 - Hellers claws / Когти Хеллера
 - Hellers whipfist / Хлыст Хеллера 
 - Hellers tendrils / Шупальца Хеллера
 - Hellers shield / Щит Хеллера
 
 (Any sword will do.)

### _OptiFine is required for the resource pack to work_
